## Classes

### <a name="dnscrypt_proxy"></a>`dnscrypt_proxy`

Install, manage configuration and service for service dnscrypt-proxy

#### Examples

##### 

```puppet
include dnscrypt_proxy
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `dnscrypt_proxy` class:

* [`package_name`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--package_name)
* [`service_name`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--service_name)
* [`config_path`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--config_path)
* [`listen_addresses`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--listen_addresses)
* [`max_clients`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--max_clients)
* [`ipv4_servers`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--ipv4_servers)
* [`ipv6_servers`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--ipv6_servers)
* [`dnscrypt_servers`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--dnscrypt_servers)
* [`doh_servers`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--doh_servers)
* [`odoh_servers`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--odoh_servers)
* [`require_dnssec`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--require_dnssec)
* [`require_nolog`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--require_nolog)
* [`require_nofilter`](#-dnscrypt_proxy--require_nofilter)

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--package_name"></a>`package_name`

Data type: `String[1]`

Package name

Default value: `'dnscrypt-proxy'`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--service_name"></a>`service_name`

Data type: `String[1]`

Service name

Default value: `'dnscrypt-proxy'`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--config_path"></a>`config_path`

Data type: `Stdlib::Absolutepath`

Path to configuration file

Default value: `'/etc/dnscrypt-proxy/dnscrypt-proxy.toml'`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--listen_addresses"></a>`listen_addresses`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

List of local addresses and ports to listen to

Default value: `['127.0.0.1:53']`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--max_clients"></a>`max_clients`

Data type: `Integer[1]`

Maximum number of simultaneous client connections to accept

Default value: `250`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--ipv4_servers"></a>`ipv4_servers`

Data type: `Boolean`

Use servers reachable over IPv4

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--ipv6_servers"></a>`ipv6_servers`

Data type: `Boolean`

Use servers reachable over IPv6 -- Do not enable if you don't have IPv6 connectiviy

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--dnscrypt_servers"></a>`dnscrypt_servers`

Data type: `Boolean`

Use servers implementing the DNSCrypt protocol

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--doh_servers"></a>`doh_servers`

Data type: `Boolean`

Use servers implementing the DNS-over-HTTPS protocol

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--odoh_servers"></a>`odoh_servers`

Data type: `Boolean`

Use servers implementing the Oblivious DoH protocol

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--require_dnssec"></a>`require_dnssec`

Data type: `Boolean`

Server must support DNS security extensions (DNSSEC)

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--require_nolog"></a>`require_nolog`

Data type: `Boolean`

Server must not log user queries (declarative)

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--require_nofilter"></a>`require_nofilter`

Data type: `Boolean`

Server must not enforce its own blocklist (for parental control, ads blocking...)

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--force_tcp"></a>`force_tcp`

Data type: `Boolean`

Always use TCP to connect to upstream servers

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--http3"></a>`http3`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable support for HTTP/3 (HTTP over QUIC)

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--http3_probe"></a>`http3_probe`

Data type: `Boolean`

When http3 is true, always try HTTP/3 first for DoH server

Default value: `false`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--timeout"></a>`timeout`

Data type: `Integer[5000]`

How long a DNS query will wait for a response, in milliseconds.

Default value: `5000`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--keepalive"></a>`keepalive`

Data type: `Integer`

Keepalive for HTTP (HTTPS, HTTP/2, HTTP/3) queries, in seconds

Default value: `30`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--disabled_server_names"></a>`disabled_server_names`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Server names to avoid even if they match all criteria

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--server_names"></a>`server_names`

Data type: `Optional[Array[String[1]]]`

Switch to a different system user after listening sockets have been created

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-dnscrypt_proxy--user_name"></a>`user_name`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

List of servers to use

Default value: `undef`
